## Safety checklist

- [ ] This change remains read-only.
- [ ] This change does not add secrets, credentials, `.env` files, private keys, customer data, or facility-private logs.
- [ ] This change uses only sample, synthetic, public, anonymized, or explicitly approved non-sensitive data.
- [ ] This change does not imply production deployment, customer validation, PMF, guaranteed improvement, certification, external endorsement, or investment readiness.
- [ ] This change does not add live Slurm control, cluster write actions, node modification, or external write actions.
- [ ] Any generated or AI-assisted content was manually reviewed for hallucinated claims and data leakage.
- [ ] Missing tests, missing evidence, or unresolved assumptions are stated clearly.
